# Innovative Park Group

> Certified AS EN 14974:2021 skatepark auditing and safety assessment service for local councils across Australia, combining formal compliance methodology with real-world functional testing by a professional skateboarder and Olympic-level coach.

Innovative Park Group (IPG) audits skateparks and wheeled sports facilities for Australian councils. Audits combine certified compliance inspection against the AS EN 14974:2021 standard with hands-on functional testing — physically skating each facility to surface usability, flow, and safety issues that a visual-only inspection would miss. IPG is led by Tommy Fynn, a certified AS EN 14974:2021 safety auditor, Olympic-level skateboarding coach, and professional skateboarder with 20+ years of experience.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.innovativeparkgroup.com/): Overview of the audit service, what makes IPG different, what's included in an audit, and how to request one.
- [About](https://www.innovativeparkgroup.com/about): Company story, leadership profile for Tommy Fynn, company values, and why councils choose IPG.
- [Services](https://www.innovativeparkgroup.com/services): The core AS EN 14974:2021 compliance audit service, what councils receive, and additional services — community engagement, strategic planning and upgrades, design consultation, and coaching clinics.
- [Contact](https://www.innovativeparkgroup.com/contact): Contact form, frequently asked questions, and how to book a free initial consultation.

## What's included in an audit

- Detailed maintenance plan with prioritized, budgeted action items
- Facility lifespan rating for long-term budget planning
- Comprehensive photographic documentation and measurements
- Functional user assessment (each park is physically skated, not just visually inspected)
- AS EN 14974:2021 alignment, suitable for insurance and funding applications
- Council-focused, prioritized recommendations

## Contact

- Email: admin@innovativeparkgroup.com
- Service area: Australia, nationwide
- Typical response time: within 24 hours on business days
